module(name = "demo", version = "1.0.0")

bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.0.9")
bazel_dep(
    name = "bazel_skylib",
    version = "1.3.0",
    repo_name = "skylib",
    dev_dependency = True,
)
single_version_override(module_name = "protobuf", version = "29.0", registry = "https://bcr.example.test")
git_override(module_name = "rules_local", remote = "https://github.com/example/rules_local.git", commit = "abc123")
local_path_override(module_name = "local_rules", path = "../local_rules")
